Support
HELP CENTER
Got questions? We have answers
How do I join the team? ▶
Contact via Get In Touch or DM on Discord/Instagram. Admin reviews and assigns you a UID.
How to see today's schedule? ▶
Login with your assigned UID. A popup shows today's full schedule including room ID and timing.
I forgot my UID — what to do? ▶
Contact admin via Discord or email. UIDs are assigned by admin only.
What is Management access? ▶
Management can add matches, change status and set banners. Delete and UID management is admin-only.
What game does Aetherix play? ▶
Aetherix Esports is exclusively focused on Free Fire — Battle Royale, Clash Squad, Custom Rooms, and Tournaments.

📨 SEND HELP REQUEST
